hero.heading: Furniture made to outlast trends
hero.body: Solid oak, walnut and natural fabrics — every sofa, bed and table is built in small batches by hand at our workshop in Tbilisi.

showcase_3d.heading: Spin a piece. Inspect every joint.
showcase_3d.body: We design and build in three dimensions — and so should you. Drag the chair to spin it, take in the lines from any angle, and get a feel for the proportions before you set foot in the showroom.
showcase_3d.hint: Click and drag to rotate. Auto-rotates when idle.

featured_categories.heading: A piece for every room, considered down to the joint

signature_products.heading: What's coming out of the workshop
signature_products.intro: A selection from the current collection — handmade, inspected, and ready to live with.

brand_story.heading: Handcrafted quality, made for your home
brand_story.body: Furnituremodern is a Tbilisi-based studio building modern, long-lasting furniture from solid oak, walnut and natural fabrics. Every piece is produced in small batches, hand-finished and inspected for fit before it leaves the workshop — so it can stay with your family for a decade or more.
brand_story.image_alt: A warm-toned living room with timber furniture and a linen sofa

quality.heading: What we do — and what we don't

item1.heading: Handcrafted
item1.body: Every piece is jointed, sanded and finished by hand — not on an assembly line.

item2.heading: Natural materials
item2.body: Solid oak, walnut and linen only — no chipboard, no veneer pretending to be wood.

item3.heading: 10-year warranty
item3.body: Every piece comes with a ten-year warranty on the frame and hardware.

visit.heading: See the work in our Tbilisi studio
visit.body: Drop into our workshop-studio in Tbilisi to feel the materials, see colour samples, and meet the maker — all visits by appointment.

category.no_products: No products in this category yet — new pieces are being finished in the workshop.

footer.tagline: Handmade modern furniture from Tbilisi — solid oak, walnut and natural fabrics, built to outlast trends.

not_found.title: Page not found
not_found.body: The page you tried to open doesn't exist. It may have been moved or removed.
not_found.meta_description: We couldn't find that page. Browse our categories or try a search.

error_boundary.title: Something went wrong
error_boundary.body: Reloading might help, or return to the home page.

privacy.page_description: How Furnituremodern collects, uses, and protects your data.

who_we_are.title: Who we are
who_we_are.body: Furnituremodern Ltd. is a Tbilisi-based studio that designs and builds modern furniture. We operate this website at the address listed below, and we are the data controller for any personal data described on this page.

what_we_collect.title: What data we collect
what_we_collect.necessary: Necessary cookies: a single first-party cookie that stores your cookie preferences. This is set the moment you make a choice in the consent banner and is required for the site to remember that choice. It is not used for analytics or advertising.
what_we_collect.analytics: Analytics data: when you opt in to analytics, we collect anonymous usage data — page paths visited, anonymous device/browser metadata, and Web Vitals performance metrics. We do not store names, email addresses, or precise location alongside these events.
what_we_collect.marketing: Marketing data: when you opt in to marketing, advertising platforms may receive anonymous attribution data so we can measure the effectiveness of campaigns. No marketing platform is enabled today, so opting in produces no actual data flow until that changes.

why_we_collect.title: Why we collect it
why_we_collect.body: We collect only what we need to operate and improve the site. Necessary cookies remember your consent choice. Analytics helps us understand which pages are useful and where the site is slow. Marketing, if enabled, would help us measure whether advertising spend reaches the right audience. We follow the principle of purpose limitation under GDPR Article 5: data is collected for explicit, legitimate purposes and is not reused for unrelated ones.

retention.title: How long we keep it
retention.intro: We keep different categories of data for different periods:
retention.redirects: Redirect history: indefinitely, because it is part of the site's operational integrity — old URLs must continue to resolve.
retention.future_features: We do not currently process orders or contact-form submissions. This section will be updated when those features ship.

third_parties.title: Who we share it with
third_parties.intro: We do not currently share data with any third party. The platforms listed below are POTENTIAL recipients — none are enabled today.
third_parties.ga: If we enable Google Analytics 4, Google will receive anonymous technical data about your device and behavior on the site, governed by Google's own privacy terms.
third_parties.gtm: If we enable Google Tag Manager, Google will receive event metadata routed through the GTM container.
third_parties.meta: If we enable the Meta Pixel, Meta will receive anonymous interaction data for advertising attribution.
third_parties.plausible: If we enable Plausible Analytics, Plausible will receive anonymous traffic data; Plausible processes data in the EU and does not use cookies.

your_rights.title: Your rights
your_rights.intro: Under GDPR you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
your_rights.access: Right of access — you can ask us what data we hold about you.
your_rights.rectification: Right to rectification — you can ask us to correct inaccurate data.
your_rights.erasure: Right to erasure — you can ask us to delete your data.
your_rights.restriction: Right to restriction — you can ask us to limit how we use your data.
your_rights.portability: Right to portability — you can ask us to provide your data in a machine-readable format.
your_rights.objection: Right to object — you can object to specific kinds of processing.

cookies.title: Cookies we set
cookies.intro: We set one first-party cookie ourselves; everything else depends on what you opt into.
cookies.fm_consent_purpose: Stores your cookie preferences (which categories you accepted).
cookies.manage_intro: You can change your preferences at any time:

contact.title: Contact us
contact.body: If you have questions about this policy or want to exercise any of your rights, contact us using the details below.
contact.response_note: We aim to respond within 30 days.

updates.title: Updates to this policy
updates.body: We will update this page when our practices change. The date at the top of the page reflects the most recent update. The most recent update was on

search.title: Search
search.comingSoonBody: We're still wiring up the catalogue search. In the meantime, browse the categories below.

banner.heading: Manage cookies
banner.body: This site uses cookies. Necessary cookies are always on — they are required for the site to function. Analytics and marketing cookies load only after you accept them.

settings.heading: Cookie preferences
settings.intro: Choose which categories of cookies you allow.
settings.necessary_description: Required for the site to work. Always on.
settings.analytics_description: Helps us understand how visitors use the site. Collected anonymously.
settings.marketing_description: Used for personalized offers. Not currently in use.
